steps.title: Use the new-evidence contrast
steps.content: Scholars thought silk first spread beyond China in the second century CE, but new evidence shows the Indus Civilization used silk at least 1,000 years earlier. The blank must show that the old view has been disproved.

steps.title: Reject weaker meanings
steps.content: Choice A means studied, not shown false. Choice C means understood incorrectly, but evidence does not misinterpret a view. Choice D means predicted in advance, which cannot describe later evidence overturning an older belief. The answer is B.
